main.description: One time-stamped sample of Dame's physical + ambient state — the same shape as the is.dame.state/self singleton, kept as an append-only log so history accumulates for charts / timelines. Written alongside each singleton update by the iPhone poster. Keyed by TID so records sort chronologically; prune or cap upstream if the volume grows.

heartRate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute.

charging.description: Whether the phone was charging at sample time.

caloriesBurned.description: Active energy burned so far that day, in kilocalories.

capturedAt.description: When the sample was taken on-device.

createdAt.description: When this sample record was written.
